2024-05-30T06:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.

2024-05-31T06:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2024-05-31T06:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。

2024-05-30T17:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to hoisting of Standby Signal No. 1 and the associated wet weather, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. pay attention to the special traffic and transport arrangements may be implemented; ii. pay attention to the possible traffic congestions of the roads; iii. plan the journey in advance; iv. allow more traveling time to cater for delay; v. drive with extra care and patience; and vi. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Road Works at Tai Po Road (Sha Tin Section)
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 大埔公路(沙田段)道路工程

2024-05-30T21:30:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate road works at Tai Po Road (Sha Tin Section), a section of Tai Po Road (Sha Tin Section) northbound from Tsing Sha Highway eastbound near Sha Tin Public School and Shing Mun Tunnel Road eastbound near Mei Wai House to Sha Tin Rural Committee Road and the associated slip roads will be temporarily closed during from 1.00 am to 6.00 am on 2 June 2024. Please refer to the Traffic Advice for details of the temporary traffic and transport arrangements. (https://www. td. gov. hk/tc/traffic_notices/index_id_75807. html) Upon completion of the aforesaid road works, Tai Po Road (Sha Tin Section) northbound between Sha Tin Plaza near Sha Tin Rural Committee Road and Man Wo House near Fo Tan Road will be widened to three-lane carriageway. Motorists should pay attention and follow the new road alignment, directional signs, road markings and traffic signs to drive carefully.
2024-05-30T21:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合大埔公路(沙田段)道路工程，由青沙公路(東行)近沙田公立學校及城門隧道路(東行)近美城苑美槐樓至沙田鄉事會路的一段大埔公路（沙田段）(北行)及相關支路將會於二零二四年六月二日(星期日)零晨一時至六時，臨時封閉，禁止所有車輛駛入。有關臨時交通及運輸安排，請參閲交通通告。(https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/traffic_notices/index_id_75807.html) 當上述道路工程完成後，介乎沙田廣場近沙田鄉事會路至禾輋邨民和樓近火炭路之間的大埔公路(沙田段)(北行)將擴闊至三線行車道。駕駛者須細心留意及遵從新的道路配置、方向標誌、道路標記和交通標誌，小心駕駛。
